label.fr: M7. Tableau de bord du secteur national de la sante (NHSS)

resultsObjects.description: Scorecard indicators at zone level (long format)
Scorecard indicators at state level (long format)
Scorecard indicators at LGA level (long format)

summary.en: Ratio of 4th ANC visits to 1st ANC visits before 20 weeks gestation. Measures ANC continuity among early attendees.
summary.fr: Ratio des 4e visites CPN aux 1eres visites CPN avant 20 semaines de grossesse.

methodology.en: Calculated as ANC4 / ANC1 (before 20 weeks) x 100. Numerator and denominator from HMIS facility reports aggregated to state and quarter level.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme CPN4 / CPN1 (avant 20 semaines) x 100. Numerateur et denominateur issus des rapports HMIS agreges par etat et trimestre.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better ANC continuity among women who started care early. Values above 100% suggest data quality issues.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure continuite des CPN. Des valeurs superieures a 100% suggerent des problemes de qualite.

typicalRange.fr: 30-80% dans la plupart des contextes d'Afrique subsaharienne.

useCases.en: Monitor ANC dropout between 1st and 4th visits
useCases.fr: Surveiller l'abandon entre la 1ere et la 4e visite CPN

useCases.en: Compare ANC continuity across states
useCases.fr: Comparer la continuite des CPN entre les etats

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to identify areas with high ANC dropout. Compare quarters to detect seasonal patterns.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour identifier les zones a fort abandon. Comparer les trimestres pour detecter les tendances saisonnieres.

summary.en: Ratio of 4th ANC visits to all 1st ANC visits. Measures ANC continuity (dropout between 1st and 4th visit).
summary.fr: Ratio des 4e visites CPN a toutes les 1eres visites CPN.

methodology.en: Calculated as ANC4 / ANC1 x 100. Both values from HMIS facility reports aggregated to state and quarter level.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme CPN4 / CPN1 x 100. Les deux valeurs proviennent des rapports HMIS agreges par etat et trimestre.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better continuity of antenatal care. Values above 100% may indicate data quality issues or women attending ANC4 without prior ANC1 registration at the same facility.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure continuite des soins prenataux. Des valeurs superieures a 100% peuvent indiquer des problemes de qualite des donnees.

typicalRange.fr: 30-80% dans la plupart des contextes d'Afrique subsaharienne.

useCases.en: Track ANC continuity over time
useCases.fr: Suivre la continuite des CPN dans le temps

useCases.en: Identify states with high ANC dropout
useCases.fr: Identifier les etats avec un fort abandon des CPN

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to compare ANC continuity. Use quarterly trends to assess programme impact.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour comparer la continuite. Utiliser les tendances trimestrielles pour evaluer l'impact des programmes.

label.fr: Taux d'accouchement assiste par du personnel qualifie

summary.en: Deliveries attended by skilled birth attendants as percentage of all reported deliveries. Institutional denominator.
summary.fr: Accouchements assistes par du personnel qualifie en pourcentage de tous les accouchements declares.

methodology.en: Calculated as SBA / deliveries x 100. Uses institutional denominator (total deliveries reported by facilities).
methodology.fr: Calcule comme accouchements assistes / accouchements x 100. Utilise le denominateur institutionnel.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate greater access to skilled care during delivery. Values near or above 100% are expected since denominator is institutional deliveries.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent un meilleur acces aux soins qualifies. Des valeurs proches ou superieures a 100% sont attendues.

useCases.en: Monitor quality of delivery care at facility level
useCases.fr: Surveiller la qualite des soins a l'accouchement

useCases.en: Identify states where SBA coverage lags
useCases.fr: Identifier les etats ou la couverture en personnel qualifie est faible

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to identify areas with lower skilled attendance. Compare quarters to track trends.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour identifier les zones a faible couverture. Comparer les trimestres pour suivre les tendances.

label.en: New FP acceptors per women of reproductive age
label.fr: Nouvelles utilisatrices de PF par femmes en age de procreer

summary.en: New family planning acceptors as percentage of estimated women of reproductive age (15-49). Denominator: total_population x 5.5%.
summary.fr: Nouvelles utilisatrices de planification familiale en pourcentage des femmes en age de procreer estimees.

methodology.en: Calculated as modern_fp / (total_population x 0.055) x 100. Population-based denominator estimates quarterly women 15-49 from total population.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme PF_moderne / (population_totale x 0.055) x 100. Denominateur base sur la population estimant les femmes 15-49 ans.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate greater uptake of modern family planning. Very high values may reflect denominator underestimation or high demand.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure adoption de la planification familiale moderne.

typicalRange.en: 2-15% per quarter in most sub-Saharan African settings.
typicalRange.fr: 2-15% par trimestre dans la plupart des contextes d'Afrique subsaharienne.

useCases.en: Track family planning programme performance
useCases.fr: Suivre la performance des programmes de planification familiale

useCases.en: Compare FP uptake across states
useCases.fr: Comparer l'adoption de la PF entre les etats

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to identify areas with low FP uptake. Quarterly trends help assess programme impact.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour identifier les zones a faible adoption. Les tendances trimestrielles aident a evaluer l'impact.

label.fr: Traitement ACT pour paludisme non complique

summary.en: Persons with confirmed uncomplicated malaria treated with ACT as percentage of confirmed uncomplicated malaria cases (or malaria positive if uncomplicated not available).
summary.fr: Personnes atteintes de paludisme non complique confirme traitees par ACT.

methodology.en: Calculated as malaria_act_treatment / malaria_uncomplicated (or malaria_positive) x 100. Institutional denominator from HMIS facility reports.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme traitement_ACT / paludisme_non_complique (ou paludisme_positif) x 100. Denominateur institutionnel.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better adherence to malaria treatment protocols. Values above 100% may indicate data quality issues or treatment of clinically diagnosed cases.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure adherence aux protocoles de traitement. Des valeurs superieures a 100% peuvent indiquer des problemes de qualite.

typicalRange.en: 60-100% in settings with adequate ACT supply.
typicalRange.fr: 60-100% dans les contextes avec un approvisionnement adequat en ACT.

useCases.en: Monitor malaria treatment protocol adherence
useCases.fr: Surveiller l'adherence aux protocoles de traitement du paludisme

useCases.en: Identify states with ACT supply or treatment gaps
useCases.fr: Identifier les etats avec des lacunes en approvisionnement ou traitement ACT

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to find treatment gaps. Seasonal trends important given malaria transmission patterns.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour trouver les lacunes. Les tendances saisonnieres sont importantes.

summary.en: Penta3 doses given as percentage of estimated quarterly births. Denominator: total_population x 1%.
summary.fr: Doses de Penta3 administrees en pourcentage des naissances trimestrielles estimees.

methodology.en: Calculated as penta3 / (total_population x 0.01) x 100. Denominator estimates quarterly births as 1% of total population.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme penta3 / (population_totale x 0.01) x 100. Le denominateur estime les naissances trimestrielles a 1% de la population.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better immunization programme performance. Values above 100% may reflect population denominator issues or cross-boundary service delivery.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure performance du programme de vaccination. Des valeurs superieures a 100% peuvent refleter des problemes de denominateur.

typicalRange.fr: 40-90% dans la plupart des contextes d'Afrique subsaharienne.

useCases.en: Track routine immunization coverage
useCases.fr: Suivre la couverture vaccinale de routine

useCases.en: Identify states with low Penta3 uptake
useCases.fr: Identifier les etats a faible couverture Penta3

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to identify immunization gaps. Quarterly trends help detect supply or demand-side issues.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour identifier les lacunes. Les tendances trimestrielles aident a detecter les problemes.

summary.en: Children fully immunized as percentage of estimated quarterly births. Denominator: total_population x 1%.
summary.fr: Enfants completement vaccines en pourcentage des naissances trimestrielles estimees.

methodology.en: Calculated as fully_immunized / (total_population x 0.01) x 100. Denominator estimates quarterly births as 1% of total population.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme completement_vaccines / (population_totale x 0.01) x 100. Le denominateur estime les naissances trimestrielles a 1% de la population.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better completion of the immunization schedule. Significant gap between Penta3 and fully immunized suggests dropout during the schedule.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure completion du calendrier vaccinal. Un ecart significatif avec Penta3 suggere un abandon.

typicalRange.fr: 30-80% dans la plupart des contextes d'Afrique subsaharienne.

useCases.en: Monitor completion of childhood immunization schedule
useCases.fr: Surveiller la completion du calendrier vaccinal infantile

useCases.en: Compare with Penta3 to assess immunization dropout
useCases.fr: Comparer avec Penta3 pour evaluer l'abandon vaccinal

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to find areas with high dropout. Compare with Penta3 coverage at the same level.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour trouver les zones a fort abandon. Comparer avec la couverture Penta3.

summary.en: New suspected hypertension cases per 10,000 person-years. Denominator: total_population x 0.25 (quarterly).
summary.fr: Nouveaux cas suspects d'hypertension pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

methodology.en: Calculated as hypertension_new / (total_population x 0.25) x 10000. Converts quarterly count to annualized rate per 10,000 person-years.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme hypertension_nouveaux / (population_totale x 0.25) x 10000. Convertit le nombre trimestriel en taux annualise pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate greater case detection, which may reflect better screening or higher disease burden. Trends over time more informative than absolute values.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure detection des cas. Les tendances dans le temps sont plus informatives que les valeurs absolues.

typicalRange.en: Varies widely by setting and screening capacity; 10-200 per 10,000 person-years.
typicalRange.fr: Varie largement selon le contexte et la capacite de depistage; 10-200 pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

useCases.en: Monitor NCD screening and detection at state level
useCases.fr: Surveiller le depistage et la detection des MNT au niveau des etats

useCases.en: Track trends in hypertension case finding
useCases.fr: Suivre les tendances dans la detection des cas d'hypertension

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to compare NCD detection rates. Quarterly trends help assess screening programme scale-up.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour comparer les taux de detection. Les tendances trimestrielles aident a evaluer la montee en charge.

label.fr: Nouveaux cas de diabete pour 10 000 personnes-annees

summary.en: New suspected diabetes cases per 10,000 person-years. Denominator: total_population x 0.25 (quarterly).
summary.fr: Nouveaux cas suspects de diabete pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

methodology.en: Calculated as diabetes_new / (total_population x 0.25) x 10000. Converts quarterly count to annualized rate per 10,000 person-years.
methodology.fr: Calcule comme diabete_nouveaux / (population_totale x 0.25) x 10000. Convertit le nombre trimestriel en taux annualise pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate greater case detection, which may reflect better screening or higher disease burden. Trends over time more informative than absolute values.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure detection des cas. Les tendances sont plus informatives que les valeurs absolues.

typicalRange.en: Varies widely by setting and screening capacity; 5-100 per 10,000 person-years.
typicalRange.fr: Varie largement selon le contexte et la capacite de depistage; 5-100 pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

useCases.en: Monitor NCD screening and detection at state level
useCases.fr: Surveiller le depistage et la detection des MNT au niveau des etats

useCases.en: Track trends in diabetes case finding
useCases.fr: Suivre les tendances dans la detection des cas de diabete

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to compare NCD detection rates. Quarterly trends help assess screening programme scale-up.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour comparer les taux de detection. Les tendances trimestrielles aident a evaluer la montee en charge.

summary.en: Percentage of expected facility reports that were submitted on time AND contained data (positive value in General Attendance, OPD, or Penta3). Derived at facility-month level then aggregated.
summary.fr: Pourcentage de rapports attendus soumis a temps ET contenant des donnees. Derive au niveau etablissement-mois puis agrege.

methodology.en: Calculated at facility-month level: a report is 'timely and complete' if submitted by deadline AND contains at least one positive value for key indicators. Aggregated to state-quarter as percentage of expected reports.
methodology.fr: Calcule au niveau etablissement-mois: un rapport est 'ponctuel et complet' s'il est soumis avant la date limite ET contient au moins une valeur positive. Agrege en pourcentage des rapports attendus.

interpretation.en: Higher values indicate better HMIS reporting performance. Low values may indicate systemic reporting challenges or data pipeline issues rather than service delivery problems.
interpretation.fr: Des valeurs plus elevees indiquent une meilleure performance de reporting HMIS. Des valeurs basses peuvent indiquer des problemes systemiques de reporting.

typicalRange.en: 50-95% depending on HMIS maturity and reporting infrastructure.
typicalRange.fr: 50-95% selon la maturite du HMIS et l'infrastructure de reporting.

useCases.en: Assess HMIS data quality and reporting reliability
useCases.fr: Evaluer la qualite des donnees HMIS et la fiabilite du reporting

useCases.en: Identify states with weak reporting systems
useCases.fr: Identifier les etats avec des systemes de reporting faibles

disaggregationGuidance.en: Disaggregate by admin_area_3 (state) to identify reporting gaps. Low timeliness may indicate infrastructure or capacity issues requiring targeted support.
disaggregationGuidance.fr: Desagreger par admin_area_3 (etat) pour identifier les lacunes de reporting. Une faible ponctualite peut indiquer des problemes necessitant un soutien cible.

parameters.description: Quarterly pregnant women as proportion of total population (annual rate x 0.25)
Quarterly births as proportion of total population (annual rate x 0.25)
Quarterly women 15-49 as proportion of total population (annual rate x 0.25)
Quarterly children under 5 as proportion of total population (annual rate x 0.25)
Quarterly infants 0-6 months as proportion of total population
